content.problemStatement:
It's not always easy to make up stories around problems ― like this one.

We know that there is a hidden sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ which contains only integers between 111 and KKK inclusive. We have acquired MMM triplets (X1,Y1,Z1),(X2,Y2,Z2),…,(XM,YM,ZM)(X_1, Y_1, Z_1), (X_2, Y_2, Z_2), \ldots, (X_M, Y_M, Z_M)(X1​,Y1​,Z1​),(X2​,Y2​,Z2​),…,(XM​,YM​,ZM​). A very reliable source has given us intel that for each valid iii, the YiY_iYi​-th occurrence of the integer XiX_iXi​ in the sequence AAA is AZiA_{Z_i}AZi​​, i.e. AZi=XiA_{Z_i} = X_iAZi​​=Xi​ and there are Yi−1Y_i-1Yi​−1 indices j<Zij \lt Z_ij<Zi​ such that Aj=XiA_j = X_iAj​=Xi​.

Find any sequence AAA consistent with this information or determine that no such sequence exists.
constraints: 1≤Xi≤K1 \le X_i \le K1≤Xi​≤K for each valid iii
1≤Yi,Zi≤N1 \le Y_i, Z_i \le N1≤Yi​,Zi​≤N for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105
the sum of KKK over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK and MMM.
MMM lines follow. For each iii (1≤i≤M1 \le i \le M1≤i≤M), the iii-th of these lines contains three space-separated integers Xi,YiX_i, Y_iXi​,Yi​ and ZiZ_iZi​.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case:


If no valid sequence exists, print a single line containing the string `"No"`.
Otherwise, print two lines.
The first of these lines should contain the string `"Yes"`.
The second line should contain NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
